title: Build AI Apps with Claude Code  | Full Tutorial for Beginners (Desktop + Terminal + VS Code)
summary: Tutorial demonstrating how to build an AI resume and cover letter generator using Claude Code across desktop, terminal, and VS Code interfaces. Covers installation, setup with Anthropic API keys, and running AI projects locally with Node.js and FastAPI.
